response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer, but their profile does not match this role's core requirements. Their professional C++ experience amounts to roughly six months at National Instruments over a decade ago, far short of the mandated 5–10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. They have no Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience — RIDE Capital was retail-oriented fintech, not capital markets — and their database background (MySQL, MongoDB) does not cover SQL Server or Oracle. The mismatch on both mandatory technical skills and the required domain expertise makes this a poor fit despite solid general engineering credentials.
strengths: Strong overall engineering seniority with staff-level roles at major tech companies
Solid software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing) and CI/CD pipeline experience
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput systems (DLang async I/O at Dunnhumby)
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, versus the required 5–10 years
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain knowledge
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MySQL/MongoDB

key_factors.factor: Missing capital markets / fixed income domain
